name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M82957 White Flower] This Zippy coin purse is made of Monogram jacquard denim, accented with contrasting calfskin trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLD pattern using jacquard weaving and achieves a stonewashed denim effect. Designed compact yet spacious, it features two large compartments and multiple pockets and credit card slots when unzipped. Size: 11*8.5*2cm
